summary: Completed testing of iteration 178 features: Fresh Treats/Meals links, Meals page, Dine dropdown, CSV export, Mira Quick Book logic, and pet selector sync. All backend tests pass (9/9). Frontend UI tests confirm all navigation links work correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 178 features verified working: 1) Fresh Treats link on Dine page correctly links to /celebrate/treats (20 products), 2) Fresh Meals link on Dine page correctly links to /dine/meals (24 products), 3) New Meals page at /dine/meals loads with products and proper categories, 4) Dine dropdown in navbar shows 'Fresh Meals' option, 5) Partner With Us button links to /partner, 6) CSV export endpoint at /api/admin/export/products-csv works with basic auth, 7) Mira Quick Book form only shows when user says explicit booking phrases like 'lock in the date', 8) Pet selector in navbar dispatches petSelectionChanged event and MiraChatWidget listens for it to sync pet selection.

features_tested.csv_export: PASS - Returns 200 with valid CSV data
features_tested.mira_quick_book: PASS - Shows only on explicit booking intent
features_tested.pet_selector_sync: PASS - Code review confirms event dispatch and listener
